---
title: "Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo"
---

This visualization layer is static-first and artifact-driven.

- No live services are queried at page render time.
- Map and scenario views read committed/generated CSVs from `data/derived/` and `outputs/`.
- Works with local `quarto render site/` and GitHub Pages deployment.

## Data Inputs

- `data/derived/faf_top_od_flows.csv`
- `data/derived/faf_zone_centroids.csv`
- `data/derived/scenario_summary.csv` (generated from available run outputs)
- `outputs/aggregate/results_summary.csv`

## Refresh UI Artifacts

```bash
Rscript tools/derive_ui_artifacts.R --top_n 200
quarto render site/
```
